children.heading: Director
children.label: 1 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of Native American Business Development appointed pursuant to .section 4303(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Eligible entity
children.label: 2 Eligible entity
children.text: The term “eligible entity” means an Indian Tribe or Tribal organization, an Indian arts and crafts organization, as that term is defined in , a Tribal enterprise, a Tribal marketing cooperative (as that term is defined by the Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior), or any other Indian-owned business.section 305a of this title

children.heading: Indian
children.label: 3 Indian
children.text: The term “Indian” has the meaning given that term in .section 5304(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Indian goods, within the meaning of ;section 305a of this title

children.label: B
children.text: goods produced or originated by an eligible entity; and

children.label: i
children.text: the term “Indian country” under ; orsection 1151 of title 18

children.heading: Former Indian reservations in Oklahoma
children.label: B Former Indian reservations in Oklahoma
i
children.text: within the jurisdictional areas of an Oklahoma Indian Tribe (as determined by the Secretary of the Interior); and

children.label: ii
children.text: recognized by the Secretary of the Interior as eligible for trust land status under part 151 of title 25, Code of Federal Regulations (as in effect on ).November 7, 2000

children.heading: Indian-owned business
children.label: 6 Indian-owned business
children.text: The term “Indian-owned business” means an entity organized for the conduct of trade or commerce with respect to which at least 50 percent of the property interests of the entity are owned by Indians or Indian Tribes (or a combination thereof).

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 7 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in .section 5304(e) of this title

children.heading: Office
children.label: 8 Office
children.text: The term “Office” means the Office of Native American Business Development established by .section 4303(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: Tribal enterprise
children.label: 10 Tribal enterprise
children.text: The term “Tribal enterprise” means a commercial activity or business managed or controlled by an Indian Tribe.

children.heading: Tribal organization
children.label: 11 Tribal organization
children.text: The term “Tribal organization” has the meaning given that term in section 5304() of this title.l
